<a id="class-codeedit"></a>

# CodeEdit

**Inherits:** [TextEdit](class_textedit.md#class-textedit) **<** [Control](class_control.md#class-control) **<** [CanvasItem](class_canvasitem.md#class-canvasitem) **<** [Node](class_node.md#class-node) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

A multiline text editor designed for editing code.

## Description

CodeEdit is a specialized [TextEdit](class_textedit.md#class-textedit) designed for editing plain text code files. It has many features commonly found in code editors such as line numbers, line folding, code completion, indent management, and string/comment management.

**Note:** Regardless of locale, **CodeEdit** will by default always use left-to-right text direction to correctly display source code.

| [StyleBox](class_stylebox.md#class-stylebox)    | [completion](#class-codeedit-theme-style-completion)                                           |                                 |

---

## Signals

<a id="class-codeedit-signal-breakpoint-toggled"></a>

**breakpoint_toggled**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-signal-breakpoint-toggled)

Emitted when a breakpoint is added or removed from a line. If the line is removed via backspace, a signal is emitted at the old line.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-signal-code-completion-requested"></a>

**code_completion_requested**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-signal-code-completion-requested)

Emitted when the user requests code completion. This signal will not be sent if [\_request_code_completion()](#class-codeedit-private-method-request-code-completion) is overridden or [code_completion_enabled](#class-codeedit-property-code-completion-enabled) is `false`.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-signal-symbol-hovered"></a>

**symbol_hovered**(symbol: [String](class_string.md#class-string), line: [int](class_int.md#class-int), column: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-signal-symbol-hovered)

Emitted when the user hovers over a symbol. Unlike [Control.mouse_entered](class_control.md#class-control-signal-mouse-entered), this signal is not emitted immediately, but when the cursor is over the symbol for [ProjectSettings.gui/timers/tooltip_delay_sec](class_projectsettings.md#class-projectsettings-property-gui-timers-tooltip-delay-sec) seconds.

**Note:** [symbol_tooltip_on_hover](#class-codeedit-property-symbol-tooltip-on-hover) must be `true` for this signal to be emitted.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-signal-symbol-lookup"></a>

**symbol_lookup**(symbol: [String](class_string.md#class-string), line: [int](class_int.md#class-int), column: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-signal-symbol-lookup)

Emitted when the user has clicked on a valid symbol.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-signal-symbol-validate"></a>

**symbol_validate**(symbol: [String](class_string.md#class-string)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-signal-symbol-validate)

Emitted when the user hovers over a symbol. The symbol should be validated and responded to, by calling [set_symbol_lookup_word_as_valid()](#class-codeedit-method-set-symbol-lookup-word-as-valid).

**Note:** [symbol_lookup_on_click](#class-codeedit-property-symbol-lookup-on-click) must be `true` for this signal to be emitted.

---

## Enumerations

<a id="enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind"></a>

enum **CodeCompletionKind**: [🔗](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind)

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-kind-class"></a>

[CodeCompletionKind](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind) **KIND_CLASS** = `0`

Marks the option as a class.

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-kind-function"></a>

[CodeCompletionKind](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind) **KIND_FUNCTION** = `1`

Marks the option as a function.

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-kind-signal"></a>

[CodeCompletionKind](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind) **KIND_SIGNAL** = `2`

Marks the option as a Godot signal.

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-kind-variable"></a>

[CodeCompletionKind](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind) **KIND_VARIABLE** = `3`

Marks the option as a variable.

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-kind-member"></a>

[CodeCompletionKind](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind) **KIND_MEMBER** = `4`

Marks the option as a member.

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-kind-enum"></a>

[CodeCompletionKind](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind) **KIND_ENUM** = `5`

Marks the option as an enum entry.

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-kind-constant"></a>

[CodeCompletionKind](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind) **KIND_CONSTANT** = `6`

Marks the option as a constant.

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-kind-node-path"></a>

[CodeCompletionKind](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind) **KIND_NODE_PATH** = `7`

Marks the option as a Godot node path.

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-kind-file-path"></a>

[CodeCompletionKind](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind) **KIND_FILE_PATH** = `8`

Marks the option as a file path.

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-kind-plain-text"></a>

[CodeCompletionKind](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind) **KIND_PLAIN_TEXT** = `9`

Marks the option as unclassified or plain text.

---

<a id="enum-codeedit-codecompletionlocation"></a>

enum **CodeCompletionLocation**: [🔗](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionlocation)

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-location-local"></a>

[CodeCompletionLocation](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionlocation) **LOCATION_LOCAL** = `0`

The option is local to the location of the code completion query - e.g. a local variable. Subsequent value of location represent options from the outer class, the exact value represent how far they are (in terms of inner classes).

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-location-parent-mask"></a>

[CodeCompletionLocation](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionlocation) **LOCATION_PARENT_MASK** = `256`

The option is from the containing class or a parent class, relative to the location of the code completion query. Perform a bitwise OR with the class depth (e.g. `0` for the local class, `1` for the parent, `2` for the grandparent, etc.) to store the depth of an option in the class or a parent class.

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-location-other-user-code"></a>

[CodeCompletionLocation](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionlocation) **LOCATION_OTHER_USER_CODE** = `512`

The option is from user code which is not local and not in a derived class (e.g. Autoload Singletons).

<a id="class-codeedit-constant-location-other"></a>

[CodeCompletionLocation](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionlocation) **LOCATION_OTHER** = `1024`

The option is from other engine code, not covered by the other enum constants - e.g. built-in classes.

---

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-codeedit-property-auto-brace-completion-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **auto_brace_completion_enabled** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-auto-brace-completion-enabled)

-  **set_auto_brace_completion_enabled**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_auto_brace_completion_enabled**()

If `true`, uses [auto_brace_completion_pairs](#class-codeedit-property-auto-brace-completion-pairs) to automatically insert the closing brace when the opening brace is inserted by typing or autocompletion. Also automatically removes the closing brace when using backspace on the opening brace.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-auto-brace-completion-highlight-matching"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **auto_brace_completion_highlight_matching** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-auto-brace-completion-highlight-matching)

-  **set_highlight_matching_braces_enabled**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_highlight_matching_braces_enabled**()

If `true`, highlights brace pairs when the caret is on either one, using [auto_brace_completion_pairs](#class-codeedit-property-auto-brace-completion-pairs). If matching, the pairs will be underlined. If a brace is unmatched, it is colored with [brace_mismatch_color](#class-codeedit-theme-color-brace-mismatch-color).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-auto-brace-completion-pairs"></a>

[Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary) **auto_brace_completion_pairs** = `{ "\"": "\"", "'": "'", "(": ")", "[": "]", "{": "}" }` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-auto-brace-completion-pairs)

-  **set_auto_brace_completion_pairs**(value: [Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary))
- [Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary) **get_auto_brace_completion_pairs**()

Sets the brace pairs to be autocompleted. For each entry in the dictionary, the key is the opening brace and the value is the closing brace that matches it. A brace is a [String](class_string.md#class-string) made of symbols. See [auto_brace_completion_enabled](#class-codeedit-property-auto-brace-completion-enabled) and [auto_brace_completion_highlight_matching](#class-codeedit-property-auto-brace-completion-highlight-matching).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-code-completion-enabled"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **code_completion_enabled** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-code-completion-enabled)

-  **set_code_completion_enabled**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_code_completion_enabled**()

If `true`, the [ProjectSettings.input/ui_text_completion_query](class_projectsettings.md#class-projectsettings-property-input-ui-text-completion-query) action requests code completion. To handle it, see [\_request_code_completion()](#class-codeedit-private-method-request-code-completion) or [code_completion_requested](#class-codeedit-signal-code-completion-requested).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-code-completion-prefixes"></a>

[Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[String](class_string.md#class-string)] **code_completion_prefixes** = `[]` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-code-completion-prefixes)

-  **set_code_completion_prefixes**(value: [Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[String](class_string.md#class-string)])
- [Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[String](class_string.md#class-string)] **get_code_completion_prefixes**()

Sets prefixes that will trigger code completion.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-delimiter-comments"></a>

[Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[String](class_string.md#class-string)] **delimiter_comments** = `[]` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-delimiter-comments)

-  **set_comment_delimiters**(value: [Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[String](class_string.md#class-string)])
- [Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[String](class_string.md#class-string)] **get_comment_delimiters**()

Sets the comment delimiters. All existing comment delimiters will be removed.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-delimiter-strings"></a>

[Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[String](class_string.md#class-string)] **delimiter_strings** = `["' '", "\" \""]` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-delimiter-strings)

-  **set_string_delimiters**(value: [Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[String](class_string.md#class-string)])
- [Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[String](class_string.md#class-string)] **get_string_delimiters**()

Sets the string delimiters. All existing string delimiters will be removed.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-bookmarks"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **gutters_draw_bookmarks** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-bookmarks)

-  **set_draw_bookmarks_gutter**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_drawing_bookmarks_gutter**()

If `true`, bookmarks are drawn in the gutter. This gutter is shared with breakpoints and executing lines. See [set_line_as_bookmarked()](#class-codeedit-method-set-line-as-bookmarked).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-breakpoints-gutter"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **gutters_draw_breakpoints_gutter** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-breakpoints-gutter)

-  **set_draw_breakpoints_gutter**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_drawing_breakpoints_gutter**()

If `true`, breakpoints are drawn in the gutter. This gutter is shared with bookmarks and executing lines. Clicking the gutter will toggle the breakpoint for the line, see [set_line_as_breakpoint()](#class-codeedit-method-set-line-as-breakpoint).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-executing-lines"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **gutters_draw_executing_lines** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-executing-lines)

-  **set_draw_executing_lines_gutter**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_drawing_executing_lines_gutter**()

If `true`, executing lines are marked in the gutter. This gutter is shared with breakpoints and bookmarks. See [set_line_as_executing()](#class-codeedit-method-set-line-as-executing).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-fold-gutter"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **gutters_draw_fold_gutter** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-fold-gutter)

-  **set_draw_fold_gutter**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_drawing_fold_gutter**()

If `true`, the fold gutter is drawn. In this gutter, the [can_fold_code_region](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-can-fold-code-region) icon is drawn for each foldable line (see [can_fold_line()](#class-codeedit-method-can-fold-line)) and the [folded_code_region](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-folded-code-region) icon is drawn for each folded line (see [is_line_folded()](#class-codeedit-method-is-line-folded)). These icons can be clicked to toggle the fold state, see [toggle_foldable_line()](#class-codeedit-method-toggle-foldable-line). [line_folding](#class-codeedit-property-line-folding) must be `true` to show icons.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-line-numbers"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **gutters_draw_line_numbers** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-line-numbers)

-  **set_draw_line_numbers**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_draw_line_numbers_enabled**()

If `true`, the line number gutter is drawn. Line numbers start at `1` and are incremented for each line of text. Clicking and dragging in the line number gutter will select entire lines of text.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-gutters-line-numbers-min-digits"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **gutters_line_numbers_min_digits** = `3` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-gutters-line-numbers-min-digits)

-  **set_line_numbers_min_digits**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_line_numbers_min_digits**()

The minimum width in digits reserved for the line number gutter.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-gutters-zero-pad-line-numbers"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **gutters_zero_pad_line_numbers** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-gutters-zero-pad-line-numbers)

-  **set_line_numbers_zero_padded**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_line_numbers_zero_padded**()

If `true`, line numbers drawn in the gutter are zero padded based on the total line count. Requires [gutters_draw_line_numbers](#class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-line-numbers) to be set to `true`.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-indent-automatic"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **indent_automatic** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-indent-automatic)

-  **set_auto_indent_enabled**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_auto_indent_enabled**()

If `true`, an extra indent is automatically inserted when a new line is added and a prefix in [indent_automatic_prefixes](#class-codeedit-property-indent-automatic-prefixes) is found. If a brace pair opening key is found, the matching closing brace will be moved to another new line (see [auto_brace_completion_pairs](#class-codeedit-property-auto-brace-completion-pairs)).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-indent-automatic-prefixes"></a>

[Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[String](class_string.md#class-string)] **indent_automatic_prefixes** = `[":", "{", "[", "("]` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-indent-automatic-prefixes)

-  **set_auto_indent_prefixes**(value: [Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[String](class_string.md#class-string)])
- [Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[String](class_string.md#class-string)] **get_auto_indent_prefixes**()

Prefixes to trigger an automatic indent. Used when [indent_automatic](#class-codeedit-property-indent-automatic) is set to `true`.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-indent-size"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **indent_size** = `4` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-indent-size)

-  **set_indent_size**(value: [int](class_int.md#class-int))
- [int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_indent_size**()

Size of the tabulation indent (one `Tab` press) in characters. If [indent_use_spaces](#class-codeedit-property-indent-use-spaces) is enabled the number of spaces to use.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-indent-use-spaces"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **indent_use_spaces** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-indent-use-spaces)

-  **set_indent_using_spaces**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_indent_using_spaces**()

Use spaces instead of tabs for indentation.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-line-folding"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **line_folding** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-line-folding)

-  **set_line_folding_enabled**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_line_folding_enabled**()

If `true`, lines can be folded. Otherwise, line folding methods like [fold_line()](#class-codeedit-method-fold-line) will not work and [can_fold_line()](#class-codeedit-method-can-fold-line) will always return `false`. See [gutters_draw_fold_gutter](#class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-fold-gutter).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-line-length-guidelines"></a>

[Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[int](class_int.md#class-int)] **line_length_guidelines** = `[]` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-line-length-guidelines)

-  **set_line_length_guidelines**(value: [Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[int](class_int.md#class-int)])
- [Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[int](class_int.md#class-int)] **get_line_length_guidelines**()

Draws vertical lines at the provided columns. The first entry is considered a main hard guideline and is drawn more prominently.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-symbol-lookup-on-click"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **symbol_lookup_on_click** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-symbol-lookup-on-click)

-  **set_symbol_lookup_on_click_enabled**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_symbol_lookup_on_click_enabled**()

Set when a validated word from [symbol_validate](#class-codeedit-signal-symbol-validate) is clicked, the [symbol_lookup](#class-codeedit-signal-symbol-lookup) should be emitted.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-property-symbol-tooltip-on-hover"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **symbol_tooltip_on_hover** = `false` [🔗](#class-codeedit-property-symbol-tooltip-on-hover)

-  **set_symbol_tooltip_on_hover_enabled**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_symbol_tooltip_on_hover_enabled**()

If `true`, the [symbol_hovered](#class-codeedit-signal-symbol-hovered) signal is emitted when hovering over a word.

---

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-codeedit-private-method-confirm-code-completion"></a>

 **\_confirm_code_completion**(replace: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-private-method-confirm-code-completion)

Override this method to define how the selected entry should be inserted. If `replace` is `true`, any existing text should be replaced.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-private-method-filter-code-completion-candidates"></a>

[Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary)] **\_filter_code_completion_candidates**(candidates: [Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary)])   [🔗](#class-codeedit-private-method-filter-code-completion-candidates)

Override this method to define what items in `candidates` should be displayed.

Both `candidates` and the return is an [Array](class_array.md#class-array) of [Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary), see [get_code_completion_option()](#class-codeedit-method-get-code-completion-option) for [Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary) content.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-private-method-request-code-completion"></a>

 **\_request_code_completion**(force: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-private-method-request-code-completion)

Override this method to define what happens when the user requests code completion. If `force` is `true`, any checks should be bypassed.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-add-auto-brace-completion-pair"></a>

 **add_auto_brace_completion_pair**(start_key: [String](class_string.md#class-string), end_key: [String](class_string.md#class-string)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-add-auto-brace-completion-pair)

Adds a brace pair.

Both the start and end keys must be symbols. Only the start key has to be unique.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-add-code-completion-option"></a>

 **add_code_completion_option**(type: [CodeCompletionKind](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind), display_text: [String](class_string.md#class-string), insert_text: [String](class_string.md#class-string), text_color: [Color](class_color.md#class-color) = Color(1, 1, 1, 1), icon: [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) = null, value: [Variant](class_variant.md#class-variant) = null, location: [int](class_int.md#class-int) = 1024) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-add-code-completion-option)

Submits an item to the queue of potential candidates for the autocomplete menu. Call [update_code_completion_options()](#class-codeedit-method-update-code-completion-options) to update the list.

`location` indicates location of the option relative to the location of the code completion query. See [CodeCompletionLocation](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionlocation) for how to set this value.

**Note:** This list will replace all current candidates.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-add-comment-delimiter"></a>

 **add_comment_delimiter**(start_key: [String](class_string.md#class-string), end_key: [String](class_string.md#class-string), line_only: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-add-comment-delimiter)

Adds a comment delimiter from `start_key` to `end_key`. Both keys should be symbols, and `start_key` must not be shared with other delimiters.

If `line_only` is `true` or `end_key` is an empty [String](class_string.md#class-string), the region does not carry over to the next line.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-add-string-delimiter"></a>

 **add_string_delimiter**(start_key: [String](class_string.md#class-string), end_key: [String](class_string.md#class-string), line_only: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-add-string-delimiter)

Defines a string delimiter from `start_key` to `end_key`. Both keys should be symbols, and `start_key` must not be shared with other delimiters.

If `line_only` is `true` or `end_key` is an empty [String](class_string.md#class-string), the region does not carry over to the next line.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-can-fold-line"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **can_fold_line**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-can-fold-line)

Returns `true` if the given line is foldable. A line is foldable if it is the start of a valid code region (see [get_code_region_start_tag()](#class-codeedit-method-get-code-region-start-tag)), if it is the start of a comment or string block, or if the next non-empty line is more indented (see [TextEdit.get_indent_level()](class_textedit.md#class-textedit-method-get-indent-level)).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-cancel-code-completion"></a>

 **cancel_code_completion**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-cancel-code-completion)

Cancels the autocomplete menu.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-clear-bookmarked-lines"></a>

 **clear_bookmarked_lines**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-clear-bookmarked-lines)

Clears all bookmarked lines.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-clear-breakpointed-lines"></a>

 **clear_breakpointed_lines**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-clear-breakpointed-lines)

Clears all breakpointed lines.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-clear-comment-delimiters"></a>

 **clear_comment_delimiters**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-clear-comment-delimiters)

Removes all comment delimiters.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-clear-executing-lines"></a>

 **clear_executing_lines**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-clear-executing-lines)

Clears all executed lines.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-clear-string-delimiters"></a>

 **clear_string_delimiters**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-clear-string-delimiters)

Removes all string delimiters.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-confirm-code-completion"></a>

 **confirm_code_completion**(replace: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-confirm-code-completion)

Inserts the selected entry into the text. If `replace` is `true`, any existing text is replaced rather than merged.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-convert-indent"></a>

 **convert_indent**(from_line: [int](class_int.md#class-int) = -1, to_line: [int](class_int.md#class-int) = -1) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-convert-indent)

Converts the indents of lines between `from_line` and `to_line` to tabs or spaces as set by [indent_use_spaces](#class-codeedit-property-indent-use-spaces).

Values of `-1` convert the entire text.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-create-code-region"></a>

 **create_code_region**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-create-code-region)

Creates a new code region with the selection. At least one single line comment delimiter have to be defined (see [add_comment_delimiter()](#class-codeedit-method-add-comment-delimiter)).

A code region is a part of code that is highlighted when folded and can help organize your script.

Code region start and end tags can be customized (see [set_code_region_tags()](#class-codeedit-method-set-code-region-tags)).

Code regions are delimited using start and end tags (respectively `region` and `endregion` by default) preceded by one line comment delimiter. (eg. `#region` and `#endregion`)

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-delete-lines"></a>

 **delete_lines**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-delete-lines)

Deletes all lines that are selected or have a caret on them.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-do-indent"></a>

 **do_indent**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-do-indent)

If there is no selection, indentation is inserted at the caret. Otherwise, the selected lines are indented like [indent_lines()](#class-codeedit-method-indent-lines). Equivalent to the [ProjectSettings.input/ui_text_indent](class_projectsettings.md#class-projectsettings-property-input-ui-text-indent) action. The indentation characters used depend on [indent_use_spaces](#class-codeedit-property-indent-use-spaces) and [indent_size](#class-codeedit-property-indent-size).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-duplicate-lines"></a>

 **duplicate_lines**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-duplicate-lines)

Duplicates all lines currently selected with any caret. Duplicates the entire line beneath the current one no matter where the caret is within the line.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-duplicate-selection"></a>

 **duplicate_selection**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-duplicate-selection)

Duplicates all selected text and duplicates all lines with a caret on them.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-fold-all-lines"></a>

 **fold_all_lines**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-fold-all-lines)

Folds all lines that are possible to be folded (see [can_fold_line()](#class-codeedit-method-can-fold-line)).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-fold-line"></a>

 **fold_line**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-fold-line)

Folds the given line, if possible (see [can_fold_line()](#class-codeedit-method-can-fold-line)).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-auto-brace-completion-close-key"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_auto_brace_completion_close_key**(open_key: [String](class_string.md#class-string))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-auto-brace-completion-close-key)

Gets the matching auto brace close key for `open_key`.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-bookmarked-lines"></a>

[PackedInt32Array](class_packedint32array.md#class-packedint32array) **get_bookmarked_lines**()  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-bookmarked-lines)

Gets all bookmarked lines.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-breakpointed-lines"></a>

[PackedInt32Array](class_packedint32array.md#class-packedint32array) **get_breakpointed_lines**()  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-breakpointed-lines)

Gets all breakpointed lines.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-code-completion-option"></a>

[Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary) **get_code_completion_option**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-code-completion-option)

Gets the completion option at `index`. The return [Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary) has the following key-values:

`kind`: [CodeCompletionKind](#enum-codeedit-codecompletionkind)

`display_text`: Text that is shown on the autocomplete menu.

`insert_text`: Text that is to be inserted when this item is selected.

`font_color`: Color of the text on the autocomplete menu.

`icon`: Icon to draw on the autocomplete menu.

`default_value`: Value of the symbol.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-code-completion-options"></a>

[Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[Dictionary](class_dictionary.md#class-dictionary)] **get_code_completion_options**()  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-code-completion-options)

Gets all completion options, see [get_code_completion_option()](#class-codeedit-method-get-code-completion-option) for return content.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-code-completion-selected-index"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_code_completion_selected_index**()  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-code-completion-selected-index)

Gets the index of the current selected completion option.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-code-region-end-tag"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_code_region_end_tag**()  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-code-region-end-tag)

Returns the code region end tag (without comment delimiter).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-code-region-start-tag"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_code_region_start_tag**()  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-code-region-start-tag)

Returns the code region start tag (without comment delimiter).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-delimiter-end-key"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_delimiter_end_key**(delimiter_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-delimiter-end-key)

Gets the end key for a string or comment region index.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-delimiter-end-position"></a>

[Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **get_delimiter_end_position**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int), column: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-delimiter-end-position)

If `line` `column` is in a string or comment, returns the end position of the region. If not or no end could be found, both [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) values will be `-1`.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-delimiter-start-key"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_delimiter_start_key**(delimiter_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-delimiter-start-key)

Gets the start key for a string or comment region index.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-delimiter-start-position"></a>

[Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) **get_delimiter_start_position**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int), column: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-delimiter-start-position)

If `line` `column` is in a string or comment, returns the start position of the region. If not or no start could be found, both [Vector2](class_vector2.md#class-vector2) values will be `-1`.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-executing-lines"></a>

[PackedInt32Array](class_packedint32array.md#class-packedint32array) **get_executing_lines**()  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-executing-lines)

Gets all executing lines.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-folded-lines"></a>

[Array](class_array.md#class-array)[[int](class_int.md#class-int)] **get_folded_lines**()  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-folded-lines)

Returns all lines that are currently folded.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-text-for-code-completion"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_text_for_code_completion**()  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-text-for-code-completion)

Returns the full text with char `0xFFFF` at the caret location.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-text-for-symbol-lookup"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_text_for_symbol_lookup**()  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-text-for-symbol-lookup)

Returns the full text with char `0xFFFF` at the cursor location.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-get-text-with-cursor-char"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_text_with_cursor_char**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int), column: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-get-text-with-cursor-char)

Returns the full text with char `0xFFFF` at the specified location.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-has-auto-brace-completion-close-key"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **has_auto_brace_completion_close_key**(close_key: [String](class_string.md#class-string))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-has-auto-brace-completion-close-key)

Returns `true` if close key `close_key` exists.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-has-auto-brace-completion-open-key"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **has_auto_brace_completion_open_key**(open_key: [String](class_string.md#class-string))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-has-auto-brace-completion-open-key)

Returns `true` if open key `open_key` exists.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-has-comment-delimiter"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **has_comment_delimiter**(start_key: [String](class_string.md#class-string))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-has-comment-delimiter)

Returns `true` if comment `start_key` exists.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-has-string-delimiter"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **has_string_delimiter**(start_key: [String](class_string.md#class-string))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-has-string-delimiter)

Returns `true` if string `start_key` exists.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-indent-lines"></a>

 **indent_lines**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-indent-lines)

Indents all lines that are selected or have a caret on them. Uses spaces or a tab depending on [indent_use_spaces](#class-codeedit-property-indent-use-spaces). See [unindent_lines()](#class-codeedit-method-unindent-lines).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-is-in-comment"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **is_in_comment**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int), column: [int](class_int.md#class-int) = -1)  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-is-in-comment)

Returns delimiter index if `line` `column` is in a comment. If `column` is not provided, will return delimiter index if the entire `line` is a comment. Otherwise `-1`.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-is-in-string"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **is_in_string**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int), column: [int](class_int.md#class-int) = -1)  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-is-in-string)

Returns the delimiter index if `line` `column` is in a string. If `column` is not provided, will return the delimiter index if the entire `line` is a string. Otherwise `-1`.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-is-line-bookmarked"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_line_bookmarked**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-is-line-bookmarked)

Returns `true` if the given line is bookmarked. See [set_line_as_bookmarked()](#class-codeedit-method-set-line-as-bookmarked).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-is-line-breakpointed"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_line_breakpointed**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-is-line-breakpointed)

Returns `true` if the given line is breakpointed. See [set_line_as_breakpoint()](#class-codeedit-method-set-line-as-breakpoint).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-is-line-code-region-end"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_line_code_region_end**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-is-line-code-region-end)

Returns `true` if the given line is a code region end. See [set_code_region_tags()](#class-codeedit-method-set-code-region-tags).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-is-line-code-region-start"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_line_code_region_start**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-is-line-code-region-start)

Returns `true` if the given line is a code region start. See [set_code_region_tags()](#class-codeedit-method-set-code-region-tags).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-is-line-executing"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_line_executing**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-is-line-executing)

Returns `true` if the given line is marked as executing. See [set_line_as_executing()](#class-codeedit-method-set-line-as-executing).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-is-line-folded"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_line_folded**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-is-line-folded)

Returns `true` if the given line is folded. See [fold_line()](#class-codeedit-method-fold-line).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-move-lines-down"></a>

 **move_lines_down**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-move-lines-down)

Moves all lines down that are selected or have a caret on them.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-move-lines-up"></a>

 **move_lines_up**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-move-lines-up)

Moves all lines up that are selected or have a caret on them.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-remove-comment-delimiter"></a>

 **remove_comment_delimiter**(start_key: [String](class_string.md#class-string)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-remove-comment-delimiter)

Removes the comment delimiter with `start_key`.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-remove-string-delimiter"></a>

 **remove_string_delimiter**(start_key: [String](class_string.md#class-string)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-remove-string-delimiter)

Removes the string delimiter with `start_key`.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-request-code-completion"></a>

 **request_code_completion**(force: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) = false) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-request-code-completion)

Emits [code_completion_requested](#class-codeedit-signal-code-completion-requested), if `force` is `true` will bypass all checks. Otherwise will check that the caret is in a word or in front of a prefix. Will ignore the request if all current options are of type file path, node path, or signal.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-set-code-completion-selected-index"></a>

 **set_code_completion_selected_index**(index: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-set-code-completion-selected-index)

Sets the current selected completion option.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-set-code-hint"></a>

 **set_code_hint**(code_hint: [String](class_string.md#class-string)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-set-code-hint)

Sets the code hint text. Pass an empty string to clear.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-set-code-hint-draw-below"></a>

 **set_code_hint_draw_below**(draw_below: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-set-code-hint-draw-below)

If `true`, the code hint will draw below the main caret. If `false`, the code hint will draw above the main caret. See [set_code_hint()](#class-codeedit-method-set-code-hint).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-set-code-region-tags"></a>

 **set_code_region_tags**(start: [String](class_string.md#class-string) = "region", end: [String](class_string.md#class-string) = "endregion") [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-set-code-region-tags)

Sets the code region start and end tags (without comment delimiter).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-set-line-as-bookmarked"></a>

 **set_line_as_bookmarked**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int), bookmarked: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-set-line-as-bookmarked)

Sets the given line as bookmarked. If `true` and [gutters_draw_bookmarks](#class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-bookmarks) is `true`, draws the [bookmark](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-bookmark) icon in the gutter for this line. See [get_bookmarked_lines()](#class-codeedit-method-get-bookmarked-lines) and [is_line_bookmarked()](#class-codeedit-method-is-line-bookmarked).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-set-line-as-breakpoint"></a>

 **set_line_as_breakpoint**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int), breakpointed: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-set-line-as-breakpoint)

Sets the given line as a breakpoint. If `true` and [gutters_draw_breakpoints_gutter](#class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-breakpoints-gutter) is `true`, draws the [breakpoint](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-breakpoint) icon in the gutter for this line. See [get_breakpointed_lines()](#class-codeedit-method-get-breakpointed-lines) and [is_line_breakpointed()](#class-codeedit-method-is-line-breakpointed).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-set-line-as-executing"></a>

 **set_line_as_executing**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int), executing: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-set-line-as-executing)

Sets the given line as executing. If `true` and [gutters_draw_executing_lines](#class-codeedit-property-gutters-draw-executing-lines) is `true`, draws the [executing_line](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-executing-line) icon in the gutter for this line. See [get_executing_lines()](#class-codeedit-method-get-executing-lines) and [is_line_executing()](#class-codeedit-method-is-line-executing).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-set-symbol-lookup-word-as-valid"></a>

 **set_symbol_lookup_word_as_valid**(valid: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-set-symbol-lookup-word-as-valid)

Sets the symbol emitted by [symbol_validate](#class-codeedit-signal-symbol-validate) as a valid lookup.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-toggle-foldable-line"></a>

 **toggle_foldable_line**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-toggle-foldable-line)

Toggle the folding of the code block at the given line.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-toggle-foldable-lines-at-carets"></a>

 **toggle_foldable_lines_at_carets**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-toggle-foldable-lines-at-carets)

Toggle the folding of the code block on all lines with a caret on them.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-unfold-all-lines"></a>

 **unfold_all_lines**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-unfold-all-lines)

Unfolds all lines that are folded.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-unfold-line"></a>

 **unfold_line**(line: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-unfold-line)

Unfolds the given line if it is folded or if it is hidden under a folded line.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-unindent-lines"></a>

 **unindent_lines**() [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-unindent-lines)

Unindents all lines that are selected or have a caret on them. Uses spaces or a tab depending on [indent_use_spaces](#class-codeedit-property-indent-use-spaces). Equivalent to the [ProjectSettings.input/ui_text_dedent](class_projectsettings.md#class-projectsettings-property-input-ui-text-dedent) action. See [indent_lines()](#class-codeedit-method-indent-lines).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-method-update-code-completion-options"></a>

 **update_code_completion_options**(force: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)) [🔗](#class-codeedit-method-update-code-completion-options)

Submits all completion options added with [add_code_completion_option()](#class-codeedit-method-add-code-completion-option). Will try to force the autocomplete menu to popup, if `force` is `true`.

**Note:** This will replace all current candidates.

---

## Theme Property Descriptions

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-color-bookmark-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **bookmark_color** = `Color(0.5, 0.64, 1, 0.8)` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-color-bookmark-color)

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) of the bookmark icon for bookmarked lines.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-color-brace-mismatch-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **brace_mismatch_color** = `Color(1, 0.2, 0.2, 1)` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-color-brace-mismatch-color)

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) of the text to highlight mismatched braces.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-color-breakpoint-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **breakpoint_color** = `Color(0.9, 0.29, 0.3, 1)` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-color-breakpoint-color)

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) of the breakpoint icon for bookmarked lines.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-color-code-folding-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **code_folding_color** = `Color(0.8, 0.8, 0.8, 0.8)` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-color-code-folding-color)

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) for all icons related to line folding.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-color-completion-background-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **completion_background_color** = `Color(0.17, 0.16, 0.2, 1)` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-color-completion-background-color)

Sets the background [Color](class_color.md#class-color) for the code completion popup.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-color-completion-existing-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **completion_existing_color** = `Color(0.87, 0.87, 0.87, 0.13)` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-color-completion-existing-color)

Background highlight [Color](class_color.md#class-color) for matching text in code completion options.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-color-completion-scroll-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **completion_scroll_color** = `Color(1, 1, 1, 0.29)` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-color-completion-scroll-color)

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) of the scrollbar in the code completion popup.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-color-completion-scroll-hovered-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **completion_scroll_hovered_color** = `Color(1, 1, 1, 0.4)` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-color-completion-scroll-hovered-color)

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) of the scrollbar in the code completion popup when hovered.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-color-completion-selected-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **completion_selected_color** = `Color(0.26, 0.26, 0.27, 1)` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-color-completion-selected-color)

Background highlight [Color](class_color.md#class-color) for the current selected option item in the code completion popup.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-color-executing-line-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **executing_line_color** = `Color(0.98, 0.89, 0.27, 1)` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-color-executing-line-color)

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) of the executing icon for executing lines.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-color-folded-code-region-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **folded_code_region_color** = `Color(0.68, 0.46, 0.77, 0.2)` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-color-folded-code-region-color)

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) of background line highlight for folded code region.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-color-line-length-guideline-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **line_length_guideline_color** = `Color(0.3, 0.5, 0.8, 0.1)` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-color-line-length-guideline-color)

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) of the main line length guideline, secondary guidelines will have 50% alpha applied.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-color-line-number-color"></a>

[Color](class_color.md#class-color) **line_number_color** = `Color(0.67, 0.67, 0.67, 0.4)` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-color-line-number-color)

Sets the [Color](class_color.md#class-color) of line numbers.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-constant-completion-lines"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **completion_lines** = `7` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-constant-completion-lines)

Max number of options to display in the code completion popup at any one time.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-constant-completion-max-width"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **completion_max_width** = `50` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-constant-completion-max-width)

Max width of options in the code completion popup. Options longer than this will be cut off.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-constant-completion-scroll-width"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **completion_scroll_width** = `6` [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-constant-completion-scroll-width)

Width of the scrollbar in the code completion popup.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-icon-bookmark"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **bookmark** [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-bookmark)

Sets a custom [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) to draw in the bookmark gutter for bookmarked lines.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-icon-breakpoint"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **breakpoint** [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-breakpoint)

Sets a custom [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) to draw in the breakpoint gutter for breakpointed lines.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-icon-can-fold"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **can_fold** [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-can-fold)

Sets a custom [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) to draw in the line folding gutter when a line can be folded.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-icon-can-fold-code-region"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **can_fold_code_region** [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-can-fold-code-region)

Sets a custom [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) to draw in the line folding gutter when a code region can be folded.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-icon-completion-color-bg"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **completion_color_bg** [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-completion-color-bg)

Background panel for the color preview box in autocompletion (visible when the color is translucent).

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-icon-executing-line"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **executing_line** [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-executing-line)

Icon to draw in the executing gutter for executing lines.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-icon-folded"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **folded** [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-folded)

Sets a custom [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) to draw in the line folding gutter when a line is folded and can be unfolded.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-icon-folded-code-region"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **folded_code_region** [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-folded-code-region)

Sets a custom [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) to draw in the line folding gutter when a code region is folded and can be unfolded.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-icon-folded-eol-icon"></a>

[Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) **folded_eol_icon** [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-icon-folded-eol-icon)

Sets a custom [Texture2D](class_texture2d.md#class-texture2d) to draw at the end of a folded line.

---

<a id="class-codeedit-theme-style-completion"></a>

[StyleBox](class_stylebox.md#class-stylebox) **completion** [🔗](#class-codeedit-theme-style-completion)

[StyleBox](class_stylebox.md#class-stylebox) for the code completion popup.
